content:
IVX ENTERPRISE FINAL DEPLOYMENT EXECUTION

MODE:
EXECUTE
NO NARRATIVE
NO PLACEHOLDERS
NO ESTIMATES
NO "VERIFIED" WITHOUT EVIDENCE

OBJECTIVE

Deploy every remaining module to production.

Continue automatically until every module is either VERIFIED or BLOCKED with real evidence.

==================================================
PHASE 1 — GITHUB
==================================================

Push latest main.

Verify:

• latest commit SHA
• commit URL
• commit timestamp
• push successful

Return only real values.

==================================================
PHASE 2 — RENDER
==================================================

Deploy latest commit.

Return:

• Service
• Deploy ID
• Deploy timestamp
• Build logs
• Running SHA
• Build result

==================================================
PHASE 3 — SUPABASE
==================================================

Run all pending migrations.

Verify:

• migration IDs
• table list
• row counts
• RLS
• triggers
• functions

==================================================
PHASE 4 — COMMIT MATCH
==================================================

Verify all SHAs are identical.

GitHub SHA

=

Render SHA

=

/version SHA

=

/health SHA

If any differ:

STOP
repair
redeploy
verify again.

==================================================
PHASE 5 — FEATURE DEPLOYMENT
==================================================

Deploy and verify individually.

1. Landing Page

2. Featured Properties

3. Property Details

4. Registration

5. Member Registration

6. Email Verification

7. SMS Verification

8. Members Dashboard

9. Investor Dashboard

10. CRM

11. JV Deals

12. Property Admin

13. Media Upload

14. Instagram Cards

15. Likes

16. Comments

17. Shares

18. Saves

19. Analytics

20. Owner AI Chat

Each item must include:

HTTP Status

URL tested

PASS / FAIL

==================================================
PHASE 6 — CHAT
==================================================

Verify:

conversation creation

message persistence

AI response

reload conversation

watchdog

AI_TRIGGER_DECISION

No timeout.

==================================================
PHASE 7 — WATCHDOG
==================================================

Return:

TraceID

Checkpoint

Worker

Duration

Errors

Recovery

==================================================
PHASE 8 — FINAL PRODUCTION PROOF
==================================================

Output ONLY:

GitHub SHA

Render Deploy ID

Running SHA

Commit Match

Health Response

Version Response

Supabase Migration Status

20 Feature Results

Open Blockers

FINAL STATUS

Rules

VERIFIED only with real evidence.

FAILED if tested and failed.

BLOCKED if external dependency prevents completion.

UNVERIFIED if evidence cannot be retrieved.

Do not stop until every remaining module has one of these four states.
